message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCC00
skinparam lifelineStrategy nosolid
skinparam activationStyle rectangle
skinparam arrowColor black
skinparam arrowThickness 1
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontStyle normal
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantFontWeight normal
skinparam participantFontDecoration none
skinparam participantFontUnderline false
skinparam participantFontStrike false
skinparam participantFontItalic false
skinparam participantFontBold false
skinparam participantFontShadow false
skinparam participantFontOutline false
skinparam participantFontShadowColor #000000
skinparam participantFontShadowX 0
skinparam participantFontShadowY 0
skinparam participantFontShadowBlur 0
skinparam participantFontShadowOpacity 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSpread 0
skinparam participantFontShadowAngle 0
skinparam participantFontShadowDistance 0
skinparam participantFontShadowIntensity 0
skinparam participantFontShadowHardness 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSoftness 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSharpness 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSmoothness 0
skinparam participantFontShadowRoughness 0
skinparam participantFontShadowGrain 0
skinparam participantFontShadowNoise 0
skinparam participantFontShadowTexture 0
skinparam participantFontShadowPattern 0
skinparam participantFontShadowGradient 0
skinparam participantFontShadowRadial 0
skinparam participantFontShadowLinear 0
skinparam participantFontShadowConic 0
skinparam participantFontShadowRepeating 0
skinparam participantFontShadowNonRepeating 0
skinparam participantFontShadowFixed 0
skinparam participantFontShadowScroll 0
skinparam participantFontShadowLocal 0
skinparam participantFontShadowGlobal 0
skinparam participantFontShadowInherit 0
skinparam participantFontShadowInitial 0
skinparam participantFontShadowUnset 0
skinparam participantFontShadowCurrent 0
skinparam participantFontShadowTransparent 0
skinparam participantFontShadowOpaque 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSemiTransparent 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSemiOpaque 0
skinparam participantFontShadowLight 0
skinparam participantFontShadowDark 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMedium 0
skinparam participantFontShadowHeavy 0
skinparam participantFontShadowThin 0
skinparam participantFontShadowThick 0
skinparam participantFontShadowNarrow 0
skinparam participantFontShadowWide 0
skinparam participantFontShadowSmall 0
skinparam participantFontShadowLarge 0
skinparam participantFontShadowTiny 0
skinparam participantFontShadowHuge 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMini 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMaxi 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMicro 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMega 0
skinparam participantFontShadowNano 0
skinparam participantFontShadowPico 0
skinparam participantFontShadowFemto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowAtto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowZepto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowYocto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowRonto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowQuecto 0
skinparam participantFontShadowKilo 0
skinparam participantFontShadowMega 0
skinparam participantFontShadowGiga 0
skinparam participantFontShadowTera 0
skinparam participantFontShadowPeta 0
skinparam participantFontShadowExa 0
skinparam participantFontShadowZetta 0
skinparam participantFontShadowYotta 0
skinparam participantFontShadowRonna 0
skinparam participantFontShadowQuetta 0

participant JCallGraph as JCallGraph
participant CliManager as CliManager
participant MethodCallsList as MethodCallsList
participant CalledFromList as CalledFromList
participant File as File
participant JarFile as JarFile
participant ZipEntry as ZipEntry
participant ClassParser as ClassParser
participant ClassVisitor as ClassVisitor
participant Runner as Runner

JCallGraph -> CliManager: new CliManager()
activate CliManager
JCallGraph -> CliManager: main(args)
deactivate CliManager

JCallGraph -> MethodCallsList: getMethodCallsList()
activate MethodCallsList
MethodCallsList --> JCallGraph: MethodCallsList
deactivate MethodCallsList

JCallGraph -> File: new File
activate File
File --> JCallGraph: File
deactivate File

JCallGraph -> JarFile: new JarFile(File)
activate JarFile
JarFile --> JCallGraph: JarFile
deactivate JarFile

JCallGraph -> JCallGraph: enumerationAsStream(Enumeration<T> e)
note right of JCallGraph: Jar en formato stream

loop forEach
    alt isDirectory() and getName().endsWith(".class")
        JCallGraph -> ClassParser: new ClassParser(String, String)
        activate ClassParser
        ClassParser --> JCallGraph: cp = ClassParser
        deactivate ClassParser
        
        JCallGraph -> JCallGraph: getClassVisitor()
        JCallGraph -> ClassVisitor: apply(ClassParser)
        activate ClassVisitor
        ClassVisitor --> JCallGraph: start()
        deactivate ClassVisitor
        
        JCallGraph -> JCallGraph: HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>
        
        alt != null
            JCallGraph -> CalledFromList: add(HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>)
        end
    end
end

JCallGraph -> Runner: main(String[])
activate Runner
JCallGraph -> JCallGraph: exportFiles();
deactivate Runner

catch
    JCallGraph -> JCallGraph: printStackTrace()
end

@enduml
```
